title: Charred Bao with Kenyan Aerated Delight
description: A sweet and savory dessert combining the textures of charred bao and kenyan aerated delight.
instructions: 2. Place the charred bao on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle the honey over the bao, then sprinkle with coconut flakes (if using).
4. Bake for 5 minutes, or until the honey is caramelized.
5. While the bao is baking, mix the kenyan aerated delight with lime juice in a bowl.
6. Once the bao is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for 1 minute.
7. Split the bao in half and fill with the kenyan aerated delight mixture.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with additional coconut flakes if desired.
